notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Valenzuela pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Valenzuela grounds out, shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez grounds out to first baseman Bryce Harper. Andrés Giménez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Valenzuela pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Valenzuela grounds out to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.

notableEvents.label: J.T. Realmuto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Alec Bohm out at 2nd. J.T. Realmuto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Marsh plunked
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh hit by pitch. Trea Turner to 3rd. Bryce Harper to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Yohendrick Piñango to 3rd. Yohendrick Piñango advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Adolis García.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.
